data.acceptance:
- Copilot CLI is registered as a supported tool in managed_skills.rs, cli_skills.rs, and doctor.rs with correct platform/architecture detection
- Skills can be successfully installed for Copilot CLI (skill is placed in correct directory, verified via file system)
- Skills can be successfully updated for Copilot CLI (existing skill is replaced, verified via file system)
- Skills can be successfully uninstalled for Copilot CLI (skill is removed from directory, verified via file system)
- Doctor checks correctly identify Copilot CLI installation status and skills directory validity
- The implementation follows the existing code patterns from Codex/Claude/OpenCode (no divergent approach)
- Copilot CLI skills directory convention is documented in code or commit message
- All changes pass `make sanity` (lint, format, tests, coverage ≥95%)
